title: Publication-grade model closure, traceability, dashboard alignment, and submission-surface sync
notes: Expanded after Ralph-loop-style repo exploration. The track now explicitly covers active-path placeholder removal, welfare-ledger replacement, citation-key reconciliation between evidence registers/configs and the canonical CSL-JSON store, cross-platform reference validation, New Zealand transferability audit, full assumption-inventory expansion, canonical comparator/policy taxonomy alignment, dashboard comprehension upgrades for non-specialists, publication-safe reporting artifacts, and reconciliation of unsupported publication/SOTA claims across repo-facing documentation.
